# Oder Agency

> AI-powered growth partner. We build AI systems that grow businesses and shape future goals together.

## About

Oder Agency is an AI growth partner based in Antalya, Turkey. We build AI-powered systems that handle business operations, enabling companies to scale without proportionally growing their teams. We work on annual partnerships with quarterly reviews.

## Services

- AI automation systems for business operations
- Operations audit and workflow optimization
- System integration and deployment
- Continuous optimization and scaling

## Team

- Oltan Seven, Co-Founder & Developer
- Kerim Embel, Solution Architect
- Tutku Muriz, R&D Specialist
